docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $767.47 FILED BY ZHORNIST, TANYA AS TO DEFENDANT BRASLOW, JASMIN DBA. KRIZIA OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
